name: @chbrain/khai-engine-liminality
description: khai liminality engine — the individual threshold state between prior identity and what comes next
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: The individual threshold state between prior identity and what comes next.

card.wire: Link the persona's current threshold state (threshold, suspension, or emergence) to the expression under Projection.
card.issue: What the persona left behind and what they are waiting to become.
card.require: A prior status that has been genuinely relinquished; the new status not yet conferred.
card.enforce: Do not model the ritual that produced the liminality here; that belongs to the ritual engine. This engine models the individual's in-between state.
card.setup: Name what prior identity or status was left behind, how long the persona has been in the liminal state, and what the stakes are of what comes next.
